# CWE-544: handlers route database failures through one helper.
lang: go
file: CWE-544-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"errors"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func writeDBError(c *gin.Context, err error) {
	if errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
}

func FetchProfile(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	var name string
	if err := db.Get(&name, "SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id")); err != nil {
		writeDBError(c, err)
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, name)
}

func FetchBalance(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	var balance float64
	if err := db.Get(&balance, "SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id")); err != nil {
		writeDBError(c, err)
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"balance": balance})
}
